title: 🇳🇴 Within the framework of the visit of the President of Ukraine...
title_en: 🇳🇴 Within the framework of the visit of the President of Ukraine...
description: 🇳🇴 Within the framework of the visit of the President of Ukraine Volodymyr Zelenskyi to Norway, the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga held a meeting with Espen Bart Eide, the head of the Foreign Ministry of Norway. The parties agreed that today's visit is an important step towards the development of strategic partnership between the countries. 💬 "I expressed my sincere gratitude for Norway's steadfast support, especially during the winter period,...
description_en: 🇳🇴 Within the framework of the visit of the President of Ukraine Volodymyr Zelenskyi to Norway, the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga held a meeting with Espen Bart Eide, the head of the Foreign Ministry of Norway. The parties agreed that today's visit is an important step towards the development of strategic partnership between the countries. 💬 "I expressed my sincere gratitude for Norway's steadfast support, especially during the winter period,...
description_uk: 🇳🇴 У межах візиту Президента України Володимира Зеленського до Норвегії міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч з Еспеном Бартом Ейде, главою МЗС Норвегії. Сторони погодилися, що сьогоднішній візит є важливим кроком на шляху до розвитку стратегічного партнерства між країнами. 💬 "Я висловив щиру вдячність за непохитну підтримку Норвегії, особливо впродовж зимового періоду,...

title: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 309 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of April 15 (from 18:00 on April 14), the enemy attacked with three Iskander-M ballistic missiles from the Rostov region. - Russian Federation, as well as 324 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Shatalovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, about 250 of them are "Shahedy".
description_en: 309 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of April 15 (from 18:00 on April 14), the enemy attacked with three Iskander-M ballistic missiles from the Rostov region. - Russian Federation, as well as 324 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Shatalovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, about 250 of them are "Shahedy".
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 309 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 15 квітня (з 18:00 14 квітня) противник атакував трьома балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М із Ростовської обл. - рф, а також 324 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Курськ, Орел, Міллєрово, Шаталово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Гвардійське, Чауда – ТОТ АР Крим, близько 250 із них – "шахеди"....

title: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special...
title_en: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special...
title_uk: Польща та Ісландія приєдналися до угоди про запуск Спец...
description: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine. The required number of 17 member states of the Council of Europe has been reached for the agreement to be voted on in May, - Minister Andrii Sybiga.
description_en: Poland and Iceland joined the agreement to launch the Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine. The required number of 17 member states of the Council of Europe has been reached for the agreement to be voted on in May, - Minister Andrii Sybiga.
description_uk: Польща та Ісландія приєдналися до угоди для запуску Спецтрибуналу щодо злочину агресії проти України. Досягнуто необхідної кількості — 17 держав-членів Ради Європи — для винесення угоди на голосування у травні, — міністр Андрій Сибіга.

title: Missile launch detected
description: Russia may launch a new attack on Ukraine tonight, - Zelensky "Another Russian attack may follow tonight. There are many "Shahedov" in the sky over Ukraine now. Perhaps missiles will also be used"
description_en: Russia may launch a new attack on Ukraine tonight, - Zelensky "Another Russian attack may follow tonight. There are many "Shahedov" in the sky over Ukraine now. Perhaps missiles will also be used"
description_uk: россия может нанести новый удар по Украине сегодня ночью, - Зеленский "Сегодня ночью может последовать очередной российский удар. В небе над Украиной сейчас много "Шахедов". Возможно, будут задействованы и ракеты"

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 In Cherkasy, rioters killed an 8-year-old boy, UAVs attacked the city and the region. 9 people were also injured.
description_en: 🤬 In Cherkasy, rioters killed an 8-year-old boy, UAVs attacked the city and the region. 9 people were also injured.
description_uk: 🤬 В Черкассах рашисты убили 8-летнего мальчика, - ОВА Город и область атаковали БПЛА. Также пострадали 9 человек.

title: 25 injured
description: 💬 Andriy Sybiga commented on the Russian attack on the Dnieper: "At least 5 people were killed and 25 injured as a result of a Russian missile attack on the Dnieper. A terrible terrorist act against civilians in broad daylight. Enough pauses in the pressure on Russia! The 20th package of EU sanctions and a loan of €90 billion must be unblocked as soon as possible."
description_en: 💬 Andriy Sybiga commented on the Russian attack on the Dnieper: "At least 5 people were killed and 25 injured as a result of a Russian missile attack on the Dnieper. A terrible terrorist act against civilians in broad daylight. Enough pauses in the pressure on Russia! The 20th package of EU sanctions and a loan of €90 billion must be unblocked as soon as possible."
description_uk: 💬 Андрій Сибіга прокоментував російський удар по Дніпру: "Щонайменше 5 людей загинули і 25 отримали поранення внаслідок ракетного удару Росії по Дніпру. Жахливий терористичний акт проти цивільних серед білого дня. Досить пауз у тиску на Росію! 20-й пакет санкцій ЄС та кредит у €90 мільярдів мають бути розблоковані якнайшвидше".

title: Kharkiv: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs,...
title_en: Kharkiv: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs,...
title_uk: Харків: Росія націлила плануючими бомбами критичну дамбу в Харківській області,...
description: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.
description_en: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.
description_uk: Russia targets critical dam in Kharkiv Oblast with glide bombs, governor says. Six such bombs were directed at the Pechenihy dam in Chuhuiv district, one of the largest reservoirs in the region and a key infrastructure facility, Syniehubov said on national television.

title: Zaporizhzhia: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_en: Zaporizhzhia: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_uk: Запоріжжя: підтверджено удар по житловому будинку
description: At least 2 killed, 18 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Although the Ukrainian Air Force successfully intercepted 115 aerial targets, several strikes impacted civilian infrastructure across Kherson, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Odesa oblasts and the city of Chernihiv, damaging a medical facility, residential complexes, and port facilities. Photo: Local authorities
description_en: At least 2 killed, 18 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Although the Ukrainian Air Force successfully intercepted 115 aerial targets, several strikes impacted civilian infrastructure across Kherson, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Odesa oblasts and the city of Chernihiv, damaging a medical facility, residential complexes, and port facilities. Photo: Local authorities
description_uk: At least 2 killed, 18 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Although the Ukrainian Air Force successfully intercepted 115 aerial targets, several strikes impacted civilian infrastructure across Kherson, Kharkiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Odesa oblasts and the city of Chernihiv, damaging a medical facility, residential complexes, and port facilities. Photo: Local authorities
